description: 100% NEW tweets (searched today). No overlap with previous batch. Ready-to-use replies for IndexFast (https://indexfast.unstory.app/). All links verified working right now.

leads.pain_point_summary: New pages on site remain 'not indexed' even after requesting indexing through Search Console
leads.suggested_reply: Hey, new pages still not indexed even after GSC requests is super common. IndexFast submits directly to Google’s Indexing API and often gets them live in hours/days. Free to test: https://indexfast.unstory.app/

leads.suggested_reply: 27 days of 'Discovered – currently not indexed' with zero crawl is painful. IndexFast forces Googlebot to visit instantly via Indexing API. Might be the fix you need: https://indexfast.unstory.app/

leads.suggested_reply: Spot on — 'Crawled Not Indexed' is usually authority-related. IndexFast helps Google re-crawl and re-evaluate pages faster. Free to try: https://indexfast.unstory.app/

leads.suggested_reply: Your SEO experiment hitting 'Discovered – currently not indexed' for 25 days? IndexFast bypasses the wait by direct API submission. Worth testing: https://indexfast.unstory.app/

leads.suggested_reply: New SEO pages refusing to index? Instead of manual Claude tricks, IndexFast automates bulk submissions to Google’s Indexing API. Much faster. Free: https://indexfast.unstory.app/

leads.pain_point_summary: Canonical tag pointing to wrong domain (causing pages not to index)
leads.suggested_reply: Canonical pointing to the builder’s domain is silently killing indexing for thousands of sites. IndexFast forces Google to re-evaluate fast. Quick fix: https://indexfast.unstory.app/
